channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Biomarkers & Precision Medicine
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Biomarkers & Precision Medicine

item.title: From polyamine metabolism genes to immunoproteasome subunits: a transcriptome-based screening of candidate biomarkers in Crohn's disease.
item.description: Scientific reports - This study explored Polyamine metabolism (PM)-related biomarkers and their regulatory processes in Crohn's disease (CD) using three transcriptome datasets (GSE179285, GSE126124, and GSE102133) and ...

item.title: Pharmacokinetic characteristics of Bletilla Striata active components in rats and 1H NMR metabolomics study on ulcerative colitis.
item.description: Fitoterapia - This study aimed to systematically investigate the pharmacokinetic characteristics of Bletilla striata extract (BSE) in rats, and its metabolomic regulatory mechanism in ulcerative colitis (UC) mod...

item.title: A Novel Endoscopic Biopsy Technique for Translational Research in Patients with Inflammatory Bowel Disease.
item.description: Clinical and translational gastroenterology - Standard forceps biopsies often provide insufficient cellular yield for single-cell and spatial transcriptomic analyses. We assessed the feasibility of cold-snare resection in inflammatory bowel di...

item.title: Peripheral κ opioid receptor in pain and inflammation: From molecular signalling and gene expression to drug discovery.
item.description: British journal of pharmacology - Review - The κ opioid receptor (κ receptor, KOR) is a G protein-coupled receptor with well established roles in analgesia and immune modulation. Although historically studied primarily in the central nervou...

item.title: Multi-Omics Framework Integrating Genetics, Microbiome, Metabolism, and Immunity for Deciphering Ulcerative Colitis Pathogenesis and Diagnostic Biomarker Discovery.
item.description: FASEB journal : official publication of the Federation of American Societies for Experimental Biology - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is an inflammatory bowel disease involving complex interactions between genetics, gut microbiota, metabolism, and immunity. This study aimed to systematically evaluate multi...

item.title: Single-cell transcriptomic profiling identifies TIMP1 as a diagnostic marker linked to macrophage ferroptosis in ulcerative colitis.
item.description: Tissue & cell - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is an inflammatory bowel disease driven by genetic, immune and environmental factors, among which macrophage infiltration is one of its core pathological features. Moreover,...

item.title: Editorial: Biomarkers and beyond: predicting course and tailoring treatment in inflammatory bowel diseases.
Fecal microbiota transplantation: from empirical remedy to precision medicine.
item.description: Frontiers in microbiomes - Review - Fecal microbiota transplantation (FMT) has evolved from an empirical remedy for recurrent Clostridioides difficile infection (rCDI) into a foundational platform for precision microbiome-based thera...
